era_resolution: The traditional African methods of conflict resolution, such as tribal councils and negotiations, were often used to mitigate the effects of the Mfecane.
modern_resolution: Implementing a multidisciplinary approach incorporating advanced technologies, such as AI-driven predictive analytics and IoT-based monitoring systems, to anticipate and mitigate the systemic frictions in modern-day South Africa.

biblical_tie.context: Through wisdom is an house builded; and by understanding it is established: And by knowledge shall the chambers be filled with all precious and pleasant riches.

protocol: UESP Adaptive Stabilization (Activation of predictive modeling, integration of IoT sensors, and establishment of multidisciplinary task forces to enhance decision-making and conflict resolution in South Africa).
